scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:frontend & npm run dev:backend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w @case-couture/backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/db && npm run typecheck -w packages/types && npm run typecheck -w @case-couture/backend && npm run --if-present typecheck -w @case-couture/frontend
